cards.title: Apple adds AI features to Safari, Shortcuts, Photos
cards.body: Apple is rolling out new AI-powered capabilities across Safari, Shortcuts, and Password apps at WWDC 2026. Features include AI workflow creation, enhanced image editing with spatial Reframe, and improved Photos app functionality.

cards.title: WWDC 2026 kicks off with major announcements
cards.body: Apple's annual developer conference began with a focus on Siri AI, iOS 27, and Apple Intelligence. The event marks significant updates across the company's AI ecosystem.

cards.title: Shortcuts app gets AI prompt-based workflow builder
cards.body: Users can now describe desired workflows in natural language prompts. The AI will automatically construct the workflow without manual configuration.

cards.title: Apple Image Playground receives competitive upgrade
cards.body: Apple's AI image generator is undergoing a significant redesign. The improvements aim to make it more competitive with other image generation tools.

cards.title: Photos app gains spatial AI reframing capability
cards.body: A new Reframe feature uses AI to adjust photo perspectives automatically. Users can reshape composition without manual editing tools.

cards.title: Siri gets its own dedicated application
cards.body: Apple is launching Siri as a standalone app for the first time. This reflects the assistant's evolution into a more capable AI companion.

cards.title: Siri Camera splits bills with visual recognition
cards.body: Users can point their iPhone at receipts to identify purchases and split costs via Apple Cash. The feature simplifies group expense management.

cards.title: Siri AI transforms into intelligent companion
cards.body: The overhaul shifts Siri from a voice-controlled assistant to a full AI companion with expanded capabilities. The redesign enables significantly more complex task handling.

cards.title: Amazon Shopping adds AI merchandise design
cards.body: Users can generate custom designs with Alexa and print them on apparel and home goods. The feature integrates AI image generation directly into the shopping experience.

cards.title: OpenAI launches Lockdown Mode for data protection
cards.body: The security feature protects sensitive data from prompt injection attacks in ChatGPT. While not foolproof, it significantly reduces the likelihood of data leaks.

cards.title: Sriram Krishnan exits White House AI advisor role
cards.body: The former White House AI advisor is starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy. His departure signals potential shifts in government AI strategy.

cards.title: Trump administration considers OpenAI equity stake
cards.body: President Trump disclosed discussions about U.S. government deals with OpenAI. The arrangement would allow Americans to benefit from AI success.

cards.title: Google pays SpaceX $920M monthly for compute
cards.body: The deal stems from unexpected demand for Google's recent AI product launches. The infrastructure investment reflects the industry's exponential computing needs.

cards.title: OpenAI pursuing broader 'super app' development
cards.body: An OpenAI senior employee indicated that traditional chat interfaces are being superseded. The company is exploring expanded AI application models.

cards.title: Notion restores Anthropic access after disruption
cards.body: Notion's product leadership expressed surprise at the incident's visibility on social media. Service has been fully restored.

cards.title: AI industry faces token cost crisis escalation
cards.body: Companies are shifting from aggressive scaling to implementing cost guardrails. The conversation has shifted from maximizing tokens to controlling expenses.

cards.title: Tech industry reassesses AI spending sustainability
cards.body: Price increases are expected as major AI companies prepare public market debuts. Token costs are becoming a critical business consideration.

cards.title: Startups challenge phone-dependent tech dominance
cards.body: While AI funding surges, some founders are building alternatives to smartphone dependency. Board and similar startups emphasize in-person social experiences.

cards.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close June 8
cards.body: Final deadline for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 competition submissions is June 8, 11:59 p.m. PT. Winners will pitch on the main Disrupt stage.

cards.title: AI industry manages exploding operational costs
cards.body: Runaway compute expenses are forcing companies to establish guardrails and control mechanisms. The infrastructure burden is reshaping AI development strategies.

cards.title: Apple Adds AI Features to iPhone Apps
cards.body: Apple is integrating AI-powered capabilities into Safari, Shortcuts, and Password apps. The features help users complete sentences, edit photos, and automate workflows.

cards.title: WWDC 2026: Apple Intelligence Unveiled
cards.body: Apple's WWDC event showcased major updates to Siri, iOS 27, and Apple Intelligence. The announcements mark significant advances in on-device AI capabilities.

cards.title: Shortcuts Gets AI Workflow Builder
cards.body: Users can now describe desired workflows in natural language prompts. Shortcuts will automatically generate the necessary automation steps.

cards.title: Apple's Image Playground Improves
cards.body: Apple's AI image generator is receiving a significant overhaul. The updates aim to make it more competitive with other AI image tools.

cards.title: Photos App Gains AI Editing Tools
cards.body: A new spatial "Reframe" feature uses AI to adjust photo perspectives. Users can now easily crop and reposition images with machine learning.

cards.title: Siri Gets Dedicated App
cards.body: Apple is launching a standalone Siri application. The move positions Siri as a full-featured AI companion beyond voice control.

cards.title: Siri AI Transforms Digital Assistant
cards.body: The new Siri AI moves beyond voice commands to become an intelligent companion. It can now handle complex tasks and deeper integrations across Apple's ecosystem.

cards.title: Amazon Launches AI Merch Designer
cards.body: Amazon's Shopping app now lets users generate custom designs with Alexa. Designs can be printed on T-shirts, hoodies, tumblers, and other products.

cards.title: AI Companies Face Tokenomics Reckoning
cards.body: Big AI firms are planning IPOs amid rising token usage costs. Price increases are expected as the industry grapples with runaway infrastructure expenses.

cards.title: Notion Restores Anthropic Integration
cards.body: Notion's service disruption impacted its connection to Anthropic's AI models. The integration has been successfully restored.

cards.title: OpenAI Moves Beyond Chat Interface
cards.body: OpenAI is developing a "super app" to expand ChatGPT's functionality. Internal sources indicate the company views chat-only design as outdated.

cards.title: OpenAI Introduces Lockdown Mode
cards.body: ChatGPT now features Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injections. The security feature reduces the risk of data leakage during interactions.

cards.title: Google Pays SpaceX $920M Monthly
cards.body: Google signed a massive deal with SpaceX for computing resources. The company cited unexpected demand from its recent AI product launches.

cards.title: AI Token Costs Spiral Out of Control
cards.body: Industry leaders are shifting from "go fast" mentality to cost control. Companies are implementing guardrails to manage AI infrastructure expenses.

cards.title: AI Chatbots Impact Human Cognition
cards.body: Psychologists study how AI chatbots affect user focus and decision-making. Extended chatbot interactions may alter how people process information.

cards.title: Meta's AI Customer Support Hacked
cards.body: Attackers exploited Meta's AI agent to steal Instagram accounts. The incident reveals security gaps beyond standard AI safety measures.

cards.title: Courts Battle AI-Generated Lawsuit Flood
cards.body: Federal judges are overwhelmed with AI-generated filings from unrepresented litigants. Courts are developing strategies to manage the volume of machine-generated documents.

cards.title: Virtual Power Plants Power Data Centers
cards.body: Google signed a deal supporting virtual power plants for data center energy. These systems dynamically manage electricity consumption to support AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Small Businesses Adopt AI for Admin
cards.body: AI tools now handle accounting, design, and market research tasks. Small companies are leveraging machine learning to reduce operational overhead.

cards.title: OpenAI Prepares ChatGPT Overhaul
cards.body: OpenAI is planning major changes to ChatGPT's core functionality. The redesign reflects the company's shift away from chat-only interfaces.

cards.title: AI Weather Science Shows Limited Impact
cards.body: Recent AI advances in weather forecasting aren't as revolutionary as claimed. Machine learning models improve predictions but don't fundamentally change the field.

cards.title: Gun Detection AI Fails to Prevent Shooting
cards.body: A school shooting survivor is suing an AI gun detection firm. The system failed to identify a weapon during the incident.

cards.title: S&P 500 Blocks AI Companies
cards.body: The S&P 500 rejected entry applications from OpenAI, Anthropic, and SpaceX. The decision reflects concerns about AI company valuations and profitability.

cards.title: Fitbit Air Chatty AI Coach Disappoints
cards.body: The Fitbit Air wearable includes an AI "coach" feature that users find verbose. The device's hardware is solid, but the AI integration feels forced.
